sources.title: Fishing Regulations for Inyo County — Visit Bishop
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Lake layer record for gaz_id 267526, "South Lake", Reservoir, Inyo Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":267526,"gaz_name":"South Lake","gaz_featureclass":"Reservoir","fcode":39004,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Inyo"}; geometry (Web Mercator -13199190.6400, 4462189.1660) converts to lon -118.57035, lat 37.16542, correcting the file's prior coordinate (-118.5599, 37.1706), which was roughly 1.1km northeast of the actual lake.

regulations.humanSummary: Open the last Saturday in April through November 15
regulations.verbatimText: Last Sat. in Apr. through Nov. 15.

parameters.counting_rule: Possession limit equals the daily bag limit (1x) per the general provision at 14 CCR §7.50(a)(4): unless otherwise provided, no more than one daily bag limit may be possessed.

regulations.humanSummary: 5 trout daily bag and possession limit

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document (Table 1) lists South Lake (Inyo Co., Region R6) for Catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a release month range of April-November.
